updated: 2026-07-05 (M1: T13 done — per-turn change telemetry proves FR-CORE-04, no no-op turns; a 100-turn audit over Rivermouth is green; engine 79 + harness 11 tests green)
phase: M1 Core loop playable — Vertical Slice part 1. Prove the moment-to-moment choosing is satisfying: real move/search/fight-or-avoid/rest loop over a 5–8 node region with fog-of-war, noise, named wounds, a finite loot economy and a story-first single-decision UI. Ends at the Loop-Feel Check.

milestones.name: Pre-production
milestones.theme: GDD / PRD / DESIGN / Production Plan / art direction

milestones.name: Reactive world
milestones.theme: The world moves on its own

milestones.name: People, shelter & first story
milestones.theme: A run becomes a story — Slice Fun Gate

tasks.title: Accept ADR-0001 — engine language & runtime
tasks.note: Accepted 2026-07-05: TypeScript, pure dependency-free engine package, Node ≥22, Vitest + fast-check.

tasks.title: Accept ADR-0002 — content data format
tasks.note: Accepted 2026-07-05: JSON + JSON Schema (2020-12), one entity per file, Ajv in CI/loader only, ICU strings. Unblocks T6, T8.

tasks.title: Define GameState shape (single serializable state)
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/engine/src/state/ — full DESIGN §4 shape, readonly + integer + plain-JSON discipline, SAVE_SCHEMA_VERSION=1, 6 tests incl. property round-trip.

tasks.title: Turn pipeline shell — all 14 stages as no-ops
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/engine/src/pipeline/applyAction.ts — applyAction(state,action) runs the fixed 14 DESIGN §5 stages as pure no-op ctx transforms, returns {state,scene}; 7 tests incl. stage-order lock + property determinism.

tasks.title: Seeded RNG with named streams
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/engine/src/rng/ — sfc32+cyrb128, named streams serialized as plain-JSON uint32 arrays in GameState.rng; pure functional draw API (drawFloat/Int/Pick); 9 tests incl. determinism, stream independence, save round-trip.

tasks.title: Content loader + first schemas
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/content-loader/ (separate Ajv package, NOT in dependency-free engine) + content/schemas/region.schema.json + one throwaway region; loadContent validates & indexes by id, throws on malformed content; 9 tests. Unblocks T8.

tasks.title: Save/load lossless round-trip
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/engine/src/save/saveGame.ts — versioned SaveFile envelope (format+saveSchemaVersion+one-line summary+state), migration ladder hook (empty at v1), SaveError on corrupt/foreign/future blobs. saveGame/loadGame deep-equal round-trip incl. rng/history/queue; pure, clock-free, dependency-free. 10 tests (TC-DET-05/07).

tasks.title: CI that fails on malformed content
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/content-loader/src/validateCli.ts schema gate (exit 0 on valid content/, exit 1 on malformed) + .github/workflows/ci.yml running typecheck+tests for engine/content-loader/harness, the harness empty-turn smoke run, and a negative test proving malformed content is rejected. FR-CNT-02: volume can never corrupt a run.

tasks.title: Terminal harness runs an empty turn
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/harness/ (@zurvival/harness) — first headless engine client. runEmptyTurn() creates a run, resolves one turn through the pipeline, renders the Scene, and asserts the two M0 exit proofs (byte-identical determinism + lossless save round-trip). Runnable via `npm start` (tsx); 5 tests. M0 exit criterion met.

tasks.title: Accept ADR-0003 — save storage & versioning
tasks.note: Accepted 2026-07-05: design/decisions/0003-save-storage-versioning.md. Local-first, client-owned I/O of the T7 SaveFile string (harness/native → atomic file under OS app-data; web → IndexedDB, not localStorage); single rolling autosave slot per run written write-temp-then-atomic-rename with a retained .bak (zero-corruption target); saves export/import as text (bug repro, DESIGN §9); migration = T7 forward-only ladder, one integer SAVE_SCHEMA_VERSION bumped only on breaking state-shape change, one pure/total N→N+1 rung per bump; optional cloud sync deferred post-launch as additive transport. Unblocks T11+ real saves.

tasks.title: Region & node graph with fog-of-war + node memory
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: node graph is content — new content/schemas/node.schema.json + content/nodes/ (6 Rivermouth nodes forming a ring) + content/regions/region.rivermouth.json (replaced throwaway test-downtown). Engine prototype/engine/src/map/: buildRegionGraph enforces cross-file integrity JSON Schema can't (symmetric routes, one start, fully connected, known region/node refs) throwing MapError; NodeState gains a `discovered` fog flag (visited = lastVisit!==null); fogOfWar.discoverAround reveals a node + its neighbors; seedWorld.startRun bootstraps a run — seeds regions/nodes from baselines, stands player on start (visited today), reveals fog around it. Pure/dependency-free/integer/plain-JSON, deterministic, save-round-trips. 21 engine tests (integrity failures, reveal, seed, property) + 3 harness integration tests over shipped content. FR-SIM-02, FR-MAP-01..03,06. Unblocks T12 (move/search/rest over the graph).

tasks.title: Core action loop — move / search / rest with time cost
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: pipeline stages 1-4 + 14 made real (stages 5-13 still identity). New src/time/clock.ts (phaseOf + advanceClock: hours→day/phase rollover, turn++) and src/actions/coreActions.ts (availableActions/assertLegal/applyPlayerAction/tickNeeds/sceneOf); Action/Scene/SceneChoice extracted to src/pipeline/contract.ts. applyAction(state,action,graph?) now threads the transient graph: validate rejects unoffered actions (IllegalActionError, FR-CORE-01), advanceTime spends each action's hours (move 2/search 3/rest 6) so time always advances (FR-CORE-03), resolvePlayerAction applies move (relocate+visit+fog reveal), search (searchPct+34), rest (fatigue-40); updatePlayer drifts hunger/thirst/fatigue by hours; generateScene renders the Four Questions (FR-CORE-05). wait stays inert (0-cost) so all M0 tests pass unchanged. Pure/deterministic/integer/plain-JSON; save-lossless after every turn (FR-CORE-07). 14 engine loop tests + 2 harness integration turns over shipped Rivermouth. Unblocks T13 (telemetry that every turn changes >=1 system), T14 (noise), T17 (loot yield on search).

tasks.title: Every resolved turn changes ≥1 system (telemetry-audited)
tasks.note: Done 2026-07-05: prototype/engine/src/telemetry/turnAudit.ts — the FR-CORE-04 no-no-op-turn audit, by machine not by hand. jsonEqual (by-value plain-JSON deep-equal, honest where a pure stage re-allocates an identical slice) + diffSystems (which TRACKED_SYSTEMS changed) + auditTurn ({turn,resolved,changedSystems,ok}). TRACKED_SYSTEMS deliberately EXCLUDES meta: counting the always-advancing clock/turn would make the invariant vacuous — the audit asks whether a real system moved beyond time. applyAction now instruments every turn, returning changed[] on TurnResult (empty for an inert wait — no turn resolved). Pure/deterministic/dependency-free. 12 engine tests (jsonEqual, meta-exclusion, per-action change reporting, a fast-check property that every resolved turn over random play changes >=1 system, and a hand-built clock-only turn proving the audit reports ok:false) + a harness 100-turn telemetry audit over shipped Rivermouth (all 100 resolved turns changed >=1 system, zero violations). engine 79 + harness 11 green. Feeds T14 (noise as a per-turn node-memory change) and the T21 Loop-Feel gate.

tasks.title: Noise deposit model
tasks.note: FR-SIM-06: loud actions (search, firearms, movement) deposit noise into node memory that feeds encounter pressure; the quiet path must be legibly quieter.

tasks.title: Avoidable turn-based combat + loud firearms + stealth path
tasks.note: FR-CBT-01,02,04,05: turn-based combat the player can decline; firearms are loud and deposit noise; a full stealth path exists through every combat scenario (DoD).

tasks.title: Named wounds — treated, not regenerated
tasks.note: FR-INJ-01,04: injuries are discrete named wounds that persist and must be treated with items/time; no passive HP regen.

tasks.title: Finite, contested, depleting loot economy
tasks.note: FR-ECO-01,02,03: loot is finite per node, depletes as it is taken, and is contested by the world so scarcity is real.

tasks.title: Weight-limited inventory
tasks.note: FR-PLR-03: inventory is capped by weight, forcing take/leave decisions that interact with the loot economy.

tasks.title: Story-first single-decision UI
tasks.note: FR-UI-01,02,03,05: each turn renders as a short scene resolving to one meaningful decision; the first playable client presents the loop as narrative, not a stat grid.

tasks.title: Accessibility baseline
tasks.note: NFR-ACC-01,02: baseline accessibility starts in M1, not bolted on later — screen-reader-friendly scene text and keyboard-only play from the first client.

tasks.title: Lossless quit/resume at any turn boundary → Loop-Feel Check
tasks.note: M1 DoD & §4 gate: a full slice runs end to end; quit/resume at any turn boundary is byte-lossless; then run the Loop-Feel Check — is picking an action interesting?

adrs.title: Save storage & versioning
adrs.blocks: Unblocked: local-first client-owned saves + T7 forward-only migration ladder accepted 2026-07-05; cloud sync deferred post-launch

risks.how: Prove the slice grips before any content pour
Cut filter + Won't-now register + parking lot

tripwires.response: Force the time-boxed decision; pick and move

tripwires.tripwire: New idea enters a live milestone
tripwires.response: Route to Parking Lot; triage at boundary only

tripwires.tripwire: Build unplayed > 1 week, or 3+ systems half-done
tripwires.response: Stop; drive one to done; play it
